title: Fiery-Ricekrispie-Kebap
description: A savory and silky Turkish dish featuring crispy Rice Krispies combined with fermented vegetables and raw-friendly elements for a show-off twist.

ingredients.name: Fermented vegetables (e.g., pickled cucumbers or radishes)

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine Rice Krispies and fermented vegetables.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the mixture and stir to evenly distribute.
Mix in garlic powder until well combined.
Add red pepper flakes and mix again until flavors are distributed evenly.
Stir in fermented yogurt and raw honey or maple syrup until a sticky paste forms. The mixture will be somewhat damp but not overly wet.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Using your fingers, shape into kebabs of desired size, arranging them neatly on the baking sheet.
Bake at 160°C (320°F) for about 15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and serve immediately as a raw-friendly snack.
Optional: Serve with lemon wedges to enhance flavor and add freshness.
